diagnostics.message: shader declares 7 resource bindings but no `[RootSignature(...)]` attribute is present -- compiling with `-all-resources-bound` (D3D12) unlocks driver optimisations that skip per-resource null-binding checks on every IHV
cbuffer `Globals` is 12 bytes -- fits in a D3D12 root-constant slot (<= 32 bytes / 8 DWORDs); promote to root constants to skip the descriptor-table indirection

`SampleLevel(s, uv, 0)` pins LOD to mip 0 -- on a mipped texture this defeats the texture cache's small-footprint fetch and disables trilinear filtering; replace with `Sample(s, uv)` in pixel-shader context
`Gather(...).r` consumes only one channel -- replace with `GatherRed` to encode the channel at TMU instruction level and drop the swizzle
`SampleGrad(s, uv, 0, 0)` is equivalent to `SampleLevel(s, uv, 0)` -- the explicit-gradient TMU path costs extra issue cycles versus the explicit-LOD path
PCF / depth-compare site without a nearby `precise` qualifier -- fast-math reassociation can perturb the rounding of weight sums and produce visible shadow flicker
